profile.name: Arju Srivastav
profile.bio: Hey I'm Arju, a Computer Science student who spends half my time building different projects, and the other half keeping up with Formula 1 & watching cartoons!

prs.title: fix: resolve navigation pathing, component loading, storage serialization, and add enhancements
prs.body:
# Pull Request

## 📋 Description
This PR addresses several critical issues preventing the application and its components from loading correctly, alongside a new feature enhancement.

**Changes included:**
- Hardcoded absolute paths (`/OpenPlayground/...`) in the header and footer to prevent broken links when navigating from sub-pages.
- Updated `setActiveNavLink` logic in `index.html` and `components.js` to correctly highlight active links with absolute paths.
- Restored the missing `CommandPalette` import in `app.js` to prevent the application from crashing on initialization.
- Updated the component loader to dynamically resolve paths based on the current directory and optimized it to only fetch components that have placeholders on the active page.
- Fixed `ProjectDependencyManager` to serialize dependencies as an array instead of a `Set`, preventing corrupted `localStorage` saves.

## 🔗 Related Issue
Fixes #4559, Fixes #4557, Fixes #4554, Fixes #4548, Resolves #4553

## 📝 Type of Change

- [ ] 🆕 **New Project** - Adding a new project to OpenPlayground
- [x] 🐛 **Bug Fix** - Non-breaking fix for an issue
- [x] ✨ **Enhancement** - Improvement to existing functionality
- [ ] 📚 **Documentation** - Updates to README, comments, or docs
- [ ] 🎨 **Style** - UI/CSS improvements (no functionality change)

## 📸 Before vs After Video

## Before

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/46e6e214-60f8-4d5b-b091-5ac0797b3379

## After

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/3c5568ce-6be4-46af-99a6-b73672e4ec6c


## ✅ Checklist

### For All PRs
- [x] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guidelines
- [x] I have tested my changes locally
- [x] I have included screenshots of my changes
- [x] My code follows the project's coding style
- [x] I have NOT modified any files unrelated to my change

---

## 🧪 Testing
We ran the local server to verify that the root page and sub-pages (like Bookmarks) load without 404 console errors, and verified that clicking "About" from the Bookmarks page properly routes to the absolute path instead of duplicating the folder path.

- [x] Tested on Chrome
- [x] Tested on Firefox  
- [x] Tested on Mobile (responsive)
- [x] No console errors

## 📝 Additional Notes
The `ProjectDependencyManager` fix includes a fallback to automatically rescue users whose local storage was previously corrupted by the `Set()` serialization bug.
